<text color="C1D3FFFF">Restock, reload and get ready with the Full Clip Pack, featuring:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.
